CopyFile_V2.description: This operation copies a blob. If blob is being deleted/renamed on server right after it was copied, connector may return HTTP 404 error by it's design. Please use a delay for 1 minute before deleting or renaming newly created blob. Chunk transfer is not supported in this action. If source and destination are present in same storage account, please use relative path. Otherwise, maximum size of a source for copy blob operation is 50 MB.

CreateBlockBlob_V2.description: This operation uploads a block blob to Azure Blob Storage.

CreateFile_V2.description: This operation uploads a blob to Azure Blob Storage.

CreateShareLinkByPath_V2.description: This operation creates a SAS link for a blob using the path.

ExtractFolder_V3.description: This operation extracts an archive blob into a folder (example: .zip).

GetAccessPolicies_V2.description: This operation gets available shared access policies for a blob.

GetFileContent_V2.description: This operation retrieves blob contents using id.

GetFileContentByPath_V2.description: This operation retrieves blob contents using path.

GetFileMetadata_V2.description: This operation retrieves blob metadata using blob id.

GetFileMetadataByPath_V2.description: This operation retrieves blob metadata using path.

ListFolder_V4.description: This operation lists blobs in a container.

ListRootFolder_V4.displayName: Lists blobs in the root folder  (V2)
ListRootFolder_V4.description: This operation lists blobs in the Azure Blob Storage root folder.

OnUpdatedFiles_V2.displayName: When a blob is added or modified (properties only) (V2)
OnUpdatedFiles_V2.description: This operation triggers a flow when one or more blobs are added or modified in a container. This trigger will only fetch the file metadata. To get the file content, you can use the \"Get file content\" operation. The trigger does not fire if a file is added/updated in a subfolder. If it is required to trigger on subfolders, multiple triggers should be created.

SetBlobTierByPath_V2.description: This operation sets a tier for a block blob on a standard storage account using the path.

UpdateFile_V2.description: This operation updates a blob in Azure Blob Storage.
